text:

gdb782 output

I'm unable to build working firefox on FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE-p12 with my preferable compiler GCC, either 4.8 or 4.9 from ports.

It builds, but every start fails with "SIGBUS, Bus error". Options are default or even without OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS.

Being built with clang it works good.

gdb782 output attached.
